text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer! I hope you have a
good one.

At the start of the new year, Fuji Kiseki stops by
to give her holiday greetings.
choice_data_list: Happy New Year to you too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now, then...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll be doing a lot for me this year, so I
prepared a heartfelt gift to thank you in advance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Do you have any idea what it might be?
choice_data_list: I can't even begin to guess.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My gift to you is some heart-pounding
excitement!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let the New Year's talent show begin!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Sorry for springing this on you, but it's a
special day, and I want you to enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've already readied a line-up of performances, so
just choose what you'd like to see!

Fuji Kiseki presents me with a list of three
different options.
choice_data_list: A show of dexterous umbrella juggling.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The monologue, is it? Gotcha! I used to recite this
one all the time as a kid!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"To be, or not to be, that is the question: whether
'tis nobler in the mind to suffer..."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"To die, to sleep no more; and by a sleep, to say
we end the heartache..."

Though she's reciting a well-known monologue,
she packs it with a level of nuance that makes it
feel fresh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"To sleep, perchance to dream; aye, there's the
rub, for in that sleep of death, what dreams may
come..."

Her performance is so impressive, I start clapping
and cheering the moment she finishes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Seeing you this delighted makes me want
to thank my younger self for all her tireless
practice!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Roger! Things are about to get flashy!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hit it!

At her prompt, "Make Debut!" starts playing from
somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah!

She begins to do cartwheels and somersaults and
puts on a dazzling acrobatic show!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! How was that?

Fuji Kiseki's new choreography totally
transformed the mood of the song.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I'm glad you enjoyed it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should get some of my dorm residents to
join me and choreograph a version for eighteen
people next time!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Okay! Umbrella juggling it is.

The umbrella juggling show Fuji Kiseki puts on for
me is exquisite beyond words!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, ah, ah! Phew! That was close!

The umbrellas tip precariously on her palms, but
she never lets them fall. They're as light as
sunbeams in her hands.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hah!

For the last act, she propels a ball high, high,
high into the air from the parasol's rim and
catches it neatly with a grin!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you for your patronage.

Thanks to Fuji Kiseki, I have a wonderfully fun
New Year's Day.

I'm sure this year will be one filled with victories.
I'm ready to work hard with her and take her to
the top!
